title: Sri Lanka — Application for a Entry Visa (Form B, Regulations 6)
description: The Department of Immigration & Emigration's (Immigration & Emigration) "Application for a Entry Visa", Form B (Regulations 6), opening Sri Lanka's Visa vertical (4 of 6), following Passport (GOV-2716, 47th jurisdiction), National ID & Civic Documents (GOV-2753), and DMV (GOV-2781). This is the general entry-visa application submitted (typically at a Sri Lankan diplomatic/consular mission abroad, or at the Department itself) for a visit visa (tourist, resident, or other purpose) or a gratis visa exemption; it coexists with, and is not superseded by, the separate online ETA (Electronic Travel Authorization) system, which covers only tourist visas for nationals of a fixed list of ETA-eligible countries and has no downloadable static form of its own. Published directly by the Department (immigration.gov.lk) as a static, unauthenticated download, fetched directly (HTTP 200, application/pdf, 359,721 bytes, sha256: 78dfa0be2ee5d9afe32cfd37ae8083ab8f3dbe75a53065221614760ee74aa22). This is a flat, non-AcroForm 5-page form (confirmed via pdfjs-dist@3: zero Widget annotations, zero getFieldObjects() entries) with no extractable positioned text layer (a scanned/rasterized specimen, unlike the sibling lk/dmt and lk/drp forms' genuine text layers); every field was read from a page render (pdfjs-dist + node-canvas, standard fonts loaded) rather than a text-content transcript. Pages 1-4 are the applicant-facing application; page 5 is entirely an "Office Use Only" block (gratis/visit-visa grant particulars, visa number, correspondence number, officer name/designation, visa endorsement, and duplicate office-copy photograph/finger-mark boxes) and is excluded here as office-intake content, consistent with this registry's established convention for the same class of content. This v1.0.0 models 61 applicant-facing fields[] plus 1 documents[] entry (the applicant's photograph). GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Sri Lanka or the Department of Immigration & Emigration.

authority.name: Department of Immigration & Emigration, Sri Lanka

source.documentRef: Department of Immigration & Emigration, "Application for a Entry Visa", Form B, Regulations 6

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2789, opening Sri Lanka's Visa vertical (4 of 6) from the candidate disclosed as backlog in GOV-2781's own VERIFICATION.md. Independently fetched the source from scratch: HTTP 200, application/pdf, 359,721 bytes, sha256 78dfa0be2ee5d9afe32cfd37ae8083ab8f3dbe75a53065221614760ee74aa22, last-modified Thu, 29 Dec 2022 per a separate curl -I. Independently re-checked the ETA system (eta.gov.lk) is limited to tourist visas for a fixed list of ETA-eligible countries, with diplomatic/official/service passport holders and all other visa categories routed elsewhere; found no downloadable static form on the ETA site itself, confirming Form B is not superseded. Confirmed via pdfjs-dist@3 (legacy build): 5 pages, zero Widget annotations, getFieldObjects() returned none. getTextContent() returned zero text items on every page (a scanned/rasterized PDF), so every field was read from a page render (pdfjs-dist + node-canvas at 2x scale, standard_fonts data URL set) rather than a text-content transcript. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record and every disclosed judgment call.

fields.name: presentPassportNumber
fields.label: Number
fields.description: The applicant's present passport number.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, item 1(i): "Details of present Passport: i) Number"

fields.name: presentPassportPlaceOfIssue
fields.label: Place of Issue
fields.description: The place of issue of the applicant's present passport.

fields.name: presentPassportDateOfIssue
fields.label: Date of Issue
fields.description: The date of issue of the applicant's present passport.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, item 1(iii): "iii) Date of Issue" (Day/Month/Year boxes)

fields.name: presentPassportDateOfExpiry
fields.label: Date of Expiry
fields.description: The date of expiry of the applicant's present passport.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, item 1(iv): "iv) Date of Expiry" (Day/Month/Year boxes)

fields.name: previousPassportNumber
fields.label: Number
fields.description: The number of the applicant's previously held passport, if any. Printed under "Details of previous passport held, if any" with no explicit yes/no gate, so left optional.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, item 2(i): "Details of previous passport held, if any: i) Number"

fields.name: previousPassportPlaceOfIssue
fields.label: Place of Issue
fields.description: The place of issue of the applicant's previously held passport, if any.

fields.name: previousPassportDateOfIssue
fields.label: Date of Issue
fields.description: The date of issue of the applicant's previously held passport, if any.

fields.name: previousPassportDateOfExpiry
fields.label: Date of Expiry
fields.description: The date of expiry of the applicant's previously held passport, if any.

fields.name: fullNameAsInPassport
fields.label: Name in Full as shown in Passport
fields.description: The applicant's full name exactly as shown in their passport.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, item 3: "Name in Full as shown in Passport:"

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: Nationality
fields.description: The applicant's current nationality. Printed as a blank line with no options text, so modeled as free text rather than an invented enum.

fields.name: naturalizationDate
fields.label: If naturalized, i) Date
fields.description: The date of naturalization, applicable only if the applicant was naturalized. Printed with no explicit yes/no gate ahead of it, so left optional.

fields.name: naturalizationPlace
fields.label: Place of naturalization
fields.description: The place of naturalization, applicable only if the applicant was naturalized.

fields.name: formerNationality
fields.label: Former Nationality
fields.description: The applicant's former nationality prior to naturalization, applicable only if naturalized.

fields.name: gender
fields.label: Gender
fields.description: The applicant's gender, printed as a checkbox choice.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, item 6: "Gender *  i) Male [ ]   ii) Female [ ]"

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.description: The applicant's date of birth.

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Place of Birth
fields.description: The applicant's place of birth.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, item 8(i): "Place and country of Birth  i. Place"

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: Country of Birth
fields.description: The applicant's country of birth.

fields.name: civilStatus
fields.label: Civil Status
fields.description: The applicant's civil status, printed as a checkbox choice.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, item 9: "Civil Status *  i. Single [ ]  ii. Married [ ]  iii. Widowed [ ]  iv. Divorced [ ]"

fields.name: spouseFullName
fields.label: If Married, i) Full name of Spouse
fields.description: The applicant's spouse's full name, required only when civilStatus is 'married'.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, item 10(i): "If Married  i) Full name of Spouse:"

fields.name: spouseNationality
fields.label: ii) Nationality
fields.description: The applicant's spouse's nationality, required only when civilStatus is 'married'.

fields.name: spousePostalAddress
fields.label: iii) Postal Address
fields.description: The applicant's spouse's postal address, required only when civilStatus is 'married'.

fields.name: spousePassportNumber
fields.label: iii) Passport Number
fields.description: The applicant's spouse's passport number, required only when civilStatus is 'married'. The source form's own printed roman numeral repeats 'iii)' across the page 1/page 2 boundary (page 1 already prints an 'iii) Postal Address' under the same item 10) — a printed renumbering artifact, not a duplicate field; modeled here as a distinct spouse-passport sub-item continuing item 10 onto page 2, per its position immediately following the spouse block.

fields.name: spousePassportDateOfExpiry
fields.label: iv) Date of expiry
fields.description: The applicant's spouse's passport expiry date, required only when civilStatus is 'married'.

fields.name: heightCm
fields.label: Applicant's height in centimeters
fields.description: The applicant's height in centimeters.

fields.name: identificationMarks
fields.label: Any identification Marks of Pecularities
fields.description: Any identifying marks or physical peculiarities of the applicant. The source form's own printed label reads "Pecularities" (a printed misspelling of "Peculiarities"), preserved verbatim in the label above. No explicit gate ahead of this item, so left optional.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, item 12: "Any identification Marks of Pecularities:"

fields.name: addressInCountryOfDomicile
fields.label: Address, i) In the country of domicile
fields.description: The applicant's address in their country of domicile.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, item 13(i): "Addresss: i) In the country of domicile"

fields.name: addressDuringStayInSriLanka
fields.label: ii) During staying in Sri Lanka
fields.description: The applicant's address while staying in Sri Lanka.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, item 13(ii): "ii) During staying in Sri Lanka:"

fields.name: professionOccupation
fields.label: Profession/Occupation
fields.description: The applicant's profession or occupation.

fields.name: employerNameAddress
fields.label: Name and address of employee, if any
fields.description: The name and address of the applicant's employer, if any. The source form's own printed label reads "employee" (contextually referring to the applicant's employer, given the label's own "if any" qualifier and its pairing with item 14.ii's business-address question), preserved verbatim in the label above.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, item 14(i): "i. Name and address of employee, if any:"

fields.name: businessLocation
fields.label: ii. If in business where business is
fields.description: Where the applicant's business is located, if the applicant is in business.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, item 14(ii): "ii. If in business where business is"

fields.name: businessFax
fields.label: Fax
fields.description: The fax number of the applicant's business, if applicable.

fields.name: businessEmail
fields.label: E-mail
fields.description: The e-mail address of the applicant's business, if applicable.

fields.name: contactTelephone
fields.label: Contact Numbers, Telephone
fields.description: The applicant's own telephone number. No explicit gate is printed distinguishing which of Telephone/Mobile/Fax/E-Mail is mandatory, so all four are left optional.

fields.name: contactMobile
fields.label: Mobile
fields.description: The applicant's own mobile number.

fields.name: contactFax
fields.label: Fax
fields.description: The applicant's own fax number.

fields.name: contactEmail
fields.label: E-Mail
fields.description: The applicant's own e-mail address.

fields.name: objectOfVisit
fields.label: Object of present visit
fields.description: The purpose of the applicant's present visit to Sri Lanka, printed as a checkbox choice.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, item 16: "Object of present visit *: i. Tourist [ ]  ii. Applied for resident visa [ ]  iii. Other Purpose [ ]"

fields.name: objectOfVisitOtherSpecify
fields.label: iii. Other Purpose, Specify
fields.description: The specified other purpose of visit, required only when objectOfVisit is 'other'.

fields.name: routeAndModeOfTravel
fields.label: Route and mode of travel to Sri Lanka
fields.description: The applicant's route and mode of travel to Sri Lanka.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, item 17: "Route and mode of travel to Sri Lanka:"

fields.name: periodOfVisaRequired
fields.label: Period for which visit visa is required
fields.description: The period for which the visit visa is required (e.g. a duration such as '30 days'). Printed as an open blank box with no printed unit, so modeled as free text rather than an invented numeric+unit structure.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, item 18: "Period for which visit visa is required"

fields.name: lastPlaceOfResidenceInSriLanka
fields.label: Whether previously in Sri Lanka? If So: i Last place of residence
fields.description: The applicant's last place of residence during a previous stay in Sri Lanka, applicable only if previously in Sri Lanka. No explicit yes/no checkbox precedes this question on the source form, so left optional rather than gated on an invented boolean.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, item 19(i): "Whether previously in Sri Lanka? If So:- i Last place of residence"

fields.name: dateOfLeavingSriLanka
fields.label: ii. Date of leaving
fields.description: The date the applicant left Sri Lanka during a previous stay, applicable only if previously in Sri Lanka.

fields.name: visaLastObtainedType
fields.label: iii. Particulars of Visa last obtained
fields.description: The type of the last visa obtained by the applicant, applicable only if previously in Sri Lanka. Printed as a checkbox choice continuing item 19.
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, item 19(iii): "iii. Particulars of Visa last obtained*  Tourist [ ]  Resident visa [ ]  Other Purpose [ ]  Multiple [ ]"

fields.name: visaLastObtainedSpecify
fields.label: Specify
fields.description: The specified detail of the last visa obtained, required when visaLastObtainedType is 'resident_visa', 'other', or 'multiple' (each printed with its own 'Specify' blank; 'tourist' alone has none).
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, item 19(iii): "Resident visa [ ] Specify ___" / "Other Purpose [ ] Specify ___" / "Multiple [ ] Specify ___"

fields.name: visaLastObtainedIssueDate
fields.label: iv. Date of issue visa
fields.description: The date of issue of the last visa obtained, applicable only if previously in Sri Lanka.
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, item 19(iv): "iv. Date of issue visa"

fields.name: visaLastObtainedValidityMonths
fields.label: v. Period of validity (Month)
fields.description: The period of validity, in months, of the last visa obtained.
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, item 19(v): "v. Period of validity  Month"

fields.name: visaLastObtainedResidentVisaNumber
fields.label: vi. If residence visa, Resident visa number
fields.description: The resident visa number of the last visa obtained, required only when visaLastObtainedType is 'resident_visa'.
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, item 19(vi): "vi. If residence visa, Resident visa number:"

fields.name: priorRefusalOrApplicationDetails
fields.label: Prior refusal or previous application particulars
fields.description: Full particulars of any previous refusal of permission to visit/extend stay in Sri Lanka, or of any previous application made to a Sri Lanka visa office abroad, including by whom and when. Printed as a descriptive question with no preceding yes/no checkbox, so left optional rather than gated on an invented boolean.
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, item 20: "Whether permission to visit Sri Lanka or to extend stay in Sri Lanka has been refused previously and, if so by whom and when or whether application has been made now previously to any Sri Lanka visa office abroad? If so, full particulars and position of such application:"

fields.name: srilankaContactName
fields.label: Name
fields.description: Name of a person in Sri Lanka who can furnish information regarding the applicant and provide security for the applicant's maintenance and repatriation, if so required.

fields.name: srilankaContactAddress
fields.label: Address
fields.description: Address of the person in Sri Lanka referenced in item 21(a).

fields.name: srilankaContactNumber
fields.label: Contact No
fields.description: Contact number of the person in Sri Lanka referenced in item 21(a).

fields.name: srilankaContactRelationship
fields.label: Relationship
fields.description: Relationship of the person in Sri Lanka referenced in item 21(a) to the applicant.

fields.name: homeCountryContactName
fields.label: Name
fields.description: Name of a responsible person in the applicant's own country who can furnish information regarding the applicant.

fields.name: homeCountryContactAddress
fields.label: Address
fields.description: Address of the responsible person in the applicant's own country referenced in item 21(b).

fields.name: homeCountryContactNumber
fields.label: Contact No
fields.description: Contact number of the responsible person in the applicant's own country referenced in item 21(b).

fields.name: homeCountryContactRelationship
fields.label: Relationship
fields.description: Relationship of the responsible person in the applicant's own country referenced in item 21(b) to the applicant.

fields.name: fundsAvailableUSD
fields.label: How much money in US$ will the applicant have with him/her or have available on arrival in Sri Lanka?
fields.description: The amount of money, in US dollars, the applicant will have with them or have available on arrival in Sri Lanka.
fields.sourceRef: Page 3-4, item 22(i): "How much money in US$ will the applicant have with him/her or have available on arrival in Sri Lanka?"

fields.name: creditCardNames
fields.label: If credit card available, Name of cards
fields.description: The name(s) of credit card(s) available to the applicant, if any.
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, item 22(ii): "If credit card available, Name of cards"

fields.name: creditCardAmountSpent
fields.label: Amounts spent
fields.description: The amount printed on the source form as "Amounts spent" against the applicant's credit card(s). Printed with no unit/currency marker and no explicit yes/no gate tying it to creditCardNames, so left optional and ungated rather than inventing a requiredWhen condition on an optional string field (this registry's documented notEquals/empty-string gotcha). Modeled as a plain number in the same US$ unit as fundsAvailableUSD given the shared item-22 context.

fields.name: additionalSupportingReason
fields.label: Any other reason to urge in support of application
fields.description: Any other reason the applicant wishes to urge in support of the application.
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, item 23: "Any other reason to urge in support of application :"

fields.name: applicationDate
fields.label: Date
fields.description: The date the applicant signed and dated the application.
